name: Bean Threads with Minced Pork
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Lean ground pork, or chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bean threads and dried mushrooms in separate bowls. Cover each with hot water. Let stand for 30 minutes; drain.
2. Cut bean threads into 4-inch pieces.
3. Squeeze out excess water from mushrooms. Discard stems and cut caps into thin slices.
4. Cut chili pepper in half and scrape out seeds. Finely mince the chili pepper.
5. Thinly slice 2 of the green onions. Reserve remaining onion slivers for garnish.
6. Combine ginger and hot bean sauce in a small bowl.
7. Combine chicken broth, soy sauce, and sherry in a medium bowl.
8. Heat peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add pork or chicken and stir-fry until meat is no longer pink, about 2 minutes.
9. Add chili pepper, sliced onions, and ginger-bean sauce mixture. Stir-fry until the meat absorbs color from the bean sauce, about 1 minute.
10. Add chicken broth mixture, bean threads, and mushrooms. Simmer, uncovered, until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
11. Garnish with onion slivers and cilantro. Makes 4 servings.
